ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of sensor installation */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last sensor calibration */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated data entry */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the data */,
  "quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding data quality */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was performed */,
  "quality_check_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality checking */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "sent_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated sensor */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reading was taken */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated sensor */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit of the sensor */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
column_names: Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, industrial)
Unique identifier for each quality record
Reference to the associated data entry
Quality score assigned to the data
Date when the quality assessment was performed
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin)

ID of the user accessing the data
